content.observe: A file's blocks can be laid out contiguously, linked one to the next, or indexed through a table that points to every block.
content.fault: This file is linked, and you followed a broken pointer partway through. There's no index to recover from — the chain just ends.

hotspots.label: Contiguous Allocation
hotspots.detail: Blocks stored in one unbroken run. Fast access, but prone to fragmentation.

hotspots.label: Linked Allocation
hotspots.detail: Each block points to the next. No fragmentation, but only sequential access.

hotspots.label: Indexed Allocation
hotspots.detail: A dedicated index block lists every block the file owns.
